reviews.review_description: It is cute, charming and beautiful! The animation looks gorgeous and the story touches the heart strings by the end. I didn't want it to end, I miss the family already! The fact that you are Lucy's imaginary friend was a genius way of inserting the player into the narrative! It's one of the best on the medium, that's for sure. 10/10!

The animation style and interactions were cute, but the game was way too short!  There's, almost, nothing to do.  You stand in one spot, look around a little, interact with a few things, but mostly you're just watching a little girl trying to convince her family of a great threat they're trying to pretend isn't there.  The game has HUGE potential for a great story bit falls flat.  Every time something comes up that seems like it's leading to something exciting, it's immediately resolved like an "I told you so!" to the skeptical family.

0 replayability.  About 30 minutes of game play.  And a rushed ending.

This game could have lots of fun chapters as a stealthy "search and rescue", but as it is, would not recommend unless as a freebie.

reviews.review_title: This game sucks I'll probably be better

reviews.review_description: It reminds me of coraline a bit and I can feel the emotions of the situation and I love the ￼￼￼￼animation.
Kids love it and so do some adults. If you ever watched Coraline movie it’s like being in the movie. Very interactive and really feels like your helping the girl along her journey.

I though its a cute story about a girl.
Im a grown up so it tells me a different thing.
Poor little girl got so much trauma in her life that she is scared even in daylight and hear scratches from walls. She mostly terrified from wolves so she projects wolves with her imaginations but its clearly something sad behind the scenes. Their parents looks like has no job, tired and insulting or shouting with each others very often.
This could be an interesting story who hasnt suffered the same in his / her childhood but its a horror to live it through just like this Animation movie.
4 star for the interactions and drawings but 1 star for the atmosphere and story.
2 star overall!
I can't watch a stellar performance by a great writer with incredible art *if it keeps crashing*.

developer_response.body:
We've just released an update that should resolve the crash you're experiencing. We would love for you to give Wolves another try and update your rating if this fixes it for you.

Cheers,
The Fable Team

reviews.review_description: I read a lot of reviews saying that this game crashes all the time but mine won’t load at all. Complete waste of money.

developer_response.body:
We've just released an update that should resolve the crashes that people have been experiencing. The first load can sometimes take up to 20-30 seconds and the loading screen may not always be centered on your view. We would love for you to give Wolves another try and update your rating if this fixes it for you.

Cheers,
The Fable Team

reviews.review_description: Ya'll will more than likely enjoy this short, interactive, VR story. But one thing you will not enjoy is all the crashing this game tends to have. After crashing, you'll be required to reboot the file and not only that but, you will also have to restart the whole chapter you were on if you wish to continue playing. People have been talking about this problem and even reporting it to the developers themself for quite a while now and it's still hasn't been resolved. Not sure if they even really care but, that's very unfortunate if they don't as I truly believe it has  more  potential than they  realize. But at the same time, maybe it's a head scratcher for them as well. Definitely would have dropped a 5 star rating though if this issue was non-existent. Just thought I'd share my experience with those that were looking into downloading the game and trying it for themselves. P.S: It appears that a rare few miraculously don't experience this problem. But more likely than not, this will not be the case. If you do have a computer though, I hear that it functions a lot better on there. I can't say for certain though as I do not personally own one. Thank you & happy gaming!

developer_response.body:
We've just released an update that should resolve the crash you're experiencing. We would love for you to give Wolves another try and update your rating if this fixes it for you.

Cheers,
The Fable Team

reviews.review_title: One of Neil Gaiman’s most unique stories
reviews.review_description: If you’re a fan of Coraline you will love this atmospheric short interactive film experience. It has fun interactions and creepy moments hinting to the strange happenings that a rational person might only think will be an overactive imagination. I won’t spoil too much but the best part is the final chapter “they’re everywhere”. It’s a spine chilling tense atmospheric finale.
I couldnt even get to experience it because it kept crashing within the first 5 minutes

developer_response.body:
We've just released an update that should resolve the crash you're experiencing. We would love for you to give Wolves another try and update your rating if this fixes it for you.

Cheers,
The Fable Team

reviews.review_description: Love how interactive this story is. My first time I made a rookie mistake and threw my controller across the room because I forgot to use the wrist strap and was just so into it. Gorgeous graphics, wonderful protagonist, just amazing. Would love to see more like this.
I thought this was a game....it's not. This was the worse spent $7 of my life. Love the storyline, but they took it nowhere. So dumb!

This game was so cute and interesting. I bought it because Coraline is my all time favorite movie and Neil Gaiman was also the author of the Coraline Book. I just wish there were more games like this or that they would make a longer one. I really loved it

Unfortunately I couldn’t get very far because the game kept crashing around 15-20 minutes in…and when it crashed you have to restart and watch all everything all over. Love the art and game mechanics just a shame I couldn’t get it to run properly on Quest 2

developer_response.body:
We've just released an update that should resolve the crash you're experiencing. We would love for you to give Wolves another try and update your rating if this fixes it for you. There is a chapter selection screen that will allow you to skip over parts that you've already watched.

Cheers,
The Fable Team

reviews.review_description: The animation really brings the characters to life, especially Lucy, and interacting with her made me feel like a kid again. It’s nice to get to interact rather than watch passively. I definitely hope for longer VR experiences like this. The story is a bit abstract.

I wish that all VR content would be this good - whether a game or a movie, everything needs to look and behave like this. Wow. This takes "immersive" to a whole new level. The graphics, the voice acting... Top notch.
Although short, this is what next gen VR is all about. I love all the integration of different mechanics and possibilities in this story film. This is a great buy for its price!!
The creativity in this experience was stunning! I was totally immersed and engaged in the story, and the interactive elements were intuitive and added to the experience. Highly recommend.

I loved every second of this story. This isn’t a “game”. It’s an immersive story that keeps you drawn in from start to finish. It did crash on me once, but I just restarted the chapter and it was fine. Absolutely loved this experience.

This one is not too long at all, and its got minimal replay value. I had trouble with some of the things being outside of my area (like trying to look around the fireplace in the attic)  or trying to grab things that seemed just too far out of reach.  When you do pop out of your boundary area, the resume / pause screen can get itself lost, and you have to make sure to reset the oculus view. 

Overall, the story seemed fun, but rushed. At least I can get some more value out of it and let my kid play it, since she loves Coraline, and this is very much in the same style.
I cannot get very far into the story as it constantly crashes.  This looks like it has a lot of potential but the coding must be buggy.  I will be asking for a return for sure.

developer_response.body:
We've just released an update that should resolve the crash you're experiencing. We would love for you to give Wolves another try and update your rating if this fixes it for you.

Cheers,
The Fable Team

reviews.review_description:
I absolutely enjoyed this game. The immersion was spot on with a great story. Being a composer/producer that writes music for media content, I felt they used just the right amount of music to support the scenes. Excellent job!

It was a tad shorter than I’d hoped it would be but overall a great experience for the category of game. I let my dad try it out as it was his first time in vr and he was stunned. So absolutely a great game to showcase the vr world to newcomers yet neat enough for anyone who enjoys a great story.
This is one of my go tos for showing new VR people an interactive story. It's a little short, but by far the best example of how to make a story immersive and fun that I have played thus far!

Absolutely great game, beautiful graphics, and awesome experience. I enjoyed it a lot, and would love to replay it again and again to view the details of the story and the arts. It would be great to have more works like this. I worried a bit about crashing after reading comments, but I just purchased it and luckily no issues for me on my Quest 2.

The experience itself is amazing with this game. Unfortunately is ruined by frequent crashes, I'am unable to pass the part were the family is outside the house in the bonfire. This would be OK if the content were offered free but this is not the case. PLEASE FIX!
QUEST2 User

developer_response.body:
We've just released an update that should resolve the crash you're experiencing. We would love for you to give Wolves another try and update your rating if this fixes it for you.

Cheers,
The Fable Team

reviews.review_description: You might think it’s scary but it’s not the game is short for sure but it’s pretty fun and interesting I rather not spoil but for 9 dollars but I’d say it’s more for a younger audience they game gives you some Caroline vibes for sure

Please fix chapter three where the family is outside by the fire. It crashes, and you have to keep starting over. 
A beautiful interactive game. I rated it a four, but if fixed, I would rate a five.
Thank you.

reviews.review_description:
I love the scenery,the story, the style... it's just so perfect.
I'm a fan of freaky worlds like that and how they integrated VR and the player into the narrative is really creative and super cool!

Please, do more!!!
My daughter and I love this story! The different things you can do and the graphics are awesome!

For beginners to VR like a family member or someone who does not game.

This is a beautiful story to showcase. Has interaction, plot, and a beautiful 3D setting. 

The kitchen was very cozy.

I rarely write reviews. I can say this is my favorite oculus experience. Beautiful in every aspect and just interactive enough, this will hold your attention throughout. Like many have said, I hope that there are more stories. I love being a part of the story.

Wasn’t expecting much but a pretty good immersive story, but wow!!!— Blown away how great everything looked and how involved I felt. The art style is so clear and crisp, I kept feeling in awe as the story progressed. This will now be the game I use to show off to anyone new to try VR. I hope to see more of these high quality interactive movies. So very cool!
It’s a fun interactive game and it would be better it we could finish it. The amount of times this game crashes is sad.
